description_long: This object is a historical-style cannon mounted on a wooden carriage with four solid wheels. The cannon barrel is long, cylindrical, and made of dark metal, featuring a slightly flared muzzle and reinforced rings along its length. The wooden carriage is robust, with visible metal brackets, bolts, and side handles for maneuvering. The wheels are simple, circular, and appear to be made of solid wood with metal rims. The overall construction suggests durability and the ability to withstand significant recoil. The object has a weathered appearance, with darkened metal and aged wood textures.
description: A long, dark metal cannon mounted on a sturdy wooden carriage with four solid wheels and metal fittings, showing signs of age and use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle of the cannon and the symmetrical arrangement of the wheels and carriage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the cannon barrel, the wooden carriage, and the two wheels on one side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the breech of the cannon and the back structure of the carriage, including the wheel arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cannon barrel, carriage, and wheels from the other side, mirroring view 1.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One fixed cannon barrel mounted centrally on a wooden carriage.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; surfaces are solid dark gray and brown.
